gold: I'm gonna be fine. I didn't really get much accomplished, but thank you very much for whatever you did.

sigWerNormalizedGold: i am going to be fine i did not really get much accomplished but thank you very much for whatever you did
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: that will be fine i did not really get much accomplished but thank you very much for whatever you did

sigWerErrors.reason: Substituting 'i' with 'that' changes the subject and perspective of the sentence, which significantly alters the meaning.
'am going to be' and 'will be' are semantically equivalent ways to express future intent, so the meaning is preserved.
